1. ...

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Environment

- Node version: (e.g. `node -v` output)
- OS: (e.g. Ubuntu 24.04, macOS 14.5, Windows 11)
- Install method: CLI / MCP / REST

## Logs / output

Paste relevant logs, stack traces, or command output here. Use fenced code blocks.

## Additional context

Anything else that might help us reproduce or diagnose the issue (related tasks, recent changes, screenshots, etc.).
